## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

- Windows version: <e.g. Windows 11 23H2>

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots. (Remember: do not share private message content.)
